response.justification: Experienced full-stack engineer with roughly 15 years of varied software work, but the resume shows almost no evidence of the AI/ML depth, cloud platform strategy, or Director-level IC influence the role demands; AI exposure is limited to recent MCP and agent tooling work without products, platforms, or research to point to.
strengths: Long, broad engineering tenure across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial drive
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, products, or platforms at the level expected for an AI strategy principal
No cloud platform strategy or advisory experience with strategic customers/partners
Lacks the Director-level IC scope, thought leadership, or recognized AI expertise the role calls for

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI/ML depth and recognized expertise
No cloud platform strategy or customer-advisory experience
Broad senior engineering background with entrepreneurial track record
